summary: Although the recurrence is linear in n, the source restricts n to 0 through 37, so the reference performs at most 35 updates and timing cannot expose an asymptotic trend reliably.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 0 through 37

replacement_checks.evidence: After the three base values, the rolling recurrence performs exactly n minus 2 updates.
The certificate regression verifies every legal n from 0 through 37 against an independent recurrence.
